items.title: OpenAI launches new initiative to help find and patch open source bugs
items.raw_content: OpenAI is using AI to help the open source community better protect itself.

items.title: Fika Jobs raises $4M to build a video-first hiring platform where AI agents interview candidates
items.raw_content: Stockholm-based startup Fika Jobs is building a video-first hiring platform that combines AI interview agents with short-form video profiles, creating something that feels like a cross between LinkedIn and TikTok.

items.title: The running list: major tech layoffs in 2026 where employers cited AI
items.raw_content: A running look — in reverse chronological order — at the bigger tech companies that have announced significant layoffs this year with AI as a stated factor.
items.summary: A running look — in reverse chronological order — at the bigger tech companies that have announced significant layoffs this year with AI as a stated factor.

items.title: AI chipmaker Groq confirms $650M raise, re-staffs after Nvidia’s $20B not-acqui-hire deal
items.raw_content: What does an AI company do after one of those not-acqui-hire deals? Groq raised money, is leaning into its neocloud business, and is hiring new execs.
items.summary: What does an AI company do after one of those not-acqui-hire deals? Groq raised money, is leaning into its neocloud business, and is hiring new execs.

items.title: Nvidia wants to cut data center water use, but that’s not the same as fixing AI’s water problem
items.raw_content: Nvidia announced a new cooling system that cuts water use inside the data center. But it does nothing to address AI's biggest water use — fossil fuel power plants.
items.summary: Nvidia announced a new cooling system that cuts water use inside the data center. But it does nothing to address AI's biggest water use — fossil fuel power plants.

items.title: SpaceX inks compute deal with Reflection AI, an open source AI lab
items.raw_content: Reflection AI will pay $150 million a month beginning July 1, 2026 through 2029 for immediate access to Nvidia's latest GB300 AI chips and supporting hardware across SpaceX's Colossus 2 data center near Memphis, Tennessee.

items.title: The AI world is getting ‘loopy’
items.raw_content: The loop takes agentic AI a step further by authorizing a swarm of agents to work continuously in the background, endlessly.
items.summary: The loop takes agentic AI a step further by authorizing a swarm of agents to work continuously in the background, endlessly.

items.title: Google DeepMind bets $75M on AI’s future in Hollywood with A24 deal
items.raw_content: Google DeepMind and A24 are teaming up to build AI filmmaking tools.
items.summary: Google DeepMind and A24 are teaming up to build AI filmmaking tools.

items.title: Amazon is testing Alexa+ in India with Hindi support
items.raw_content: Amazon is planning to increase the footprint of its new conversational AI assistant Alexa+ to India and is inviting users in the country to test out a Hindi-language version.
items.summary: Amazon is planning to increase the footprint of its new conversational AI assistant Alexa+ to India and is inviting users in the country to test out a Hindi-language version.

items.title: Nvidia says its AI data center design runs hotter to use a lot less water
items.raw_content: Public pushback against data centers has emphasized their water and energy consumption, and now Nvidia is highlighting its claim that the Rubin generation reference design for a fully liquid-cooled data center has "eliminated massive amounts of power usage and pretty much all water usage." Still, it doesn't address all of the concerns around AI data […]

items.title: AI is cursing renters with the promise of impossible homes
items.raw_content: Joyce, a native New Yorker, didn't think finding her first solo apartment in the city would be easy. But she also didn't think it'd be "hell." items.title: Read this before you vibe-code another app

items.title: The Atlantic created a searchable database of the music used to train AI
items.raw_content: Atlantic reporter Alex Reisner recently uncovered four datasets of music being used to train AI models and made them fully searchable for the public. items.title: Adobe’s redesigned AI studio remembers what your creations look like

items.title: Photoshop and Premiere now have AI assistants

items.title: The film about Sam Altman has been dropped by Amazon MGM
items.raw_content: Luca Guadagnino's film about OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, Artificial, has reportedly been dropped by Amazon MGM. items.title: Barret Zoph is out at OpenAI again after just five months
items.raw_content: Five months after returning to OpenAI, Barret Zoph - the company's head of enterprise AI sales - has departed, The Verge has learned.
